chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No. 448 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge Fresh Case. 1) For Order on CMA No. 2741/2024 (Exemption) 2) For hearing of main case. 3) For Order on CMA No. 2742/2024. (Stay) -------------- 06.05.2025. Mr. Muhammad Safeer, Advocate for Appellant. -------------------- 1. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 2-3. Learned Counsel, under instructions, does not press this Appeal along with pending application(s). Ordered accordingly. Acting Chief Justice Judge Ayaz P.S.
